name: Misys plc
description: Misys plc was a prominent United Kingdom-based global software company that specialized in providing financial services software to banks, capital markets, and investment firms. Founded in 1979, the company grew to become one of the world's largest independent applications software providers, offering solutions for treasury, risk management, and core banking. Following its acquisition by Vista Equity Partners in 2012, Misys continued to operate as a major fintech player until 2017, when it merged with D+H to form Finastra, one of the largest financial technology companies in the world.
